summary: A self-motivated and independent learner who prefers solitary work and shows strong perseverance in the face of challenges.

openness.description: Prefers established methods and may be less open to new ideas.

conscientiousness.description: Demonstrates strong goal-oriented behavior and organizational skills.

extraversion.description: Strongly prefers solitary work over group settings and social interactions.

agreeableness.description: Values independence but may cooperate when necessary.

neuroticism.description: Experiences stress, particularly with exams, but manages it effectively.

vark.description: Learns best through visual content such as videos.

areas_for_growth: Managing stress related to group work
tailored_recommendations: Engage in solo projects to leverage independence
Use video tutorials for complex topics
Develop strategies for coping with exam stress
